description: Letter from Yosef b. Hiba, unknown location, to Abū Sahl Menashshe b. Ṭoviyya, in Jubayl (likely Byblos in present-day Lebanon, but there is also a Jubayl in Yemen). In Judaeo-Arabic, with some odd spellings. Very damaged. Mentions 'to Jerusalem, him and his son' in l. 5. May mention someone's good character a few lines further down. Very little of the content is preserved. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית ל-Jubayl. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
